選擇 歌曲與難度，與 start 演唱會!
required LP is same across all difficulties，so 選擇適合自己的難度!
歌曲等級越高，挑戰也越大。

如果你不知道該選哪首歌曲，use "推薦" 或 "幫我選" features!
Choose theme來自"推薦" feature與you will get 清單的歌曲 that match theme!

前 10 名 全球分數 are 顯示
於 排行榜的each 歌曲!
一起衝進前 10 名吧！

曜 can earn 獎勵s 透過完成 歌曲 goals為each 歌曲!
Note that there is 獎勵為FULL COMBO clear at each 難度!

Check 歌曲 details至learn more about each 歌曲
與至view its clear 獎勵s!

曜 can use 練習 Notebooks與Gold
至 等級 up 你的club 成員，increasing their attribute points!
Participate於演唱會與clear 每日 goals至gather necessary 道具至等級 up!

曜 can use 技能筆記至increase 你的club 成員' skill 等級!
Skills are more effective higher their skill 等級!
Participate於演唱會與clear 每日 goals至gather necessary 道具至等級 up!

Raise club 成員至her max 等級，then Idolize her 使用 螢光棒!
Idolizing changes 成員's illustration與increases her 等級 cap!

When you 招募 already recruited club 成員，you will obtain 螢光棒 instead的duplicate!
螢光棒 are essential 道具為Idolizing 你的成員!
higher 稀有度的duplicate club 成員， more 螢光棒 you will obtain!

曜 can obtain all sorts的獎勵s透過accomplishing goals!
There are additional limited goals 期間 events，so give them shot!

曜 can enjoy stories與每日 life 章節s的學園偶像!
Stories can be unlocked透過collecting event points 期間 ongoing events!
每日 life 章節s can be unlocked 透過完成 歌曲來自each group!

Tap 當 節奏圖示 overlap!
better 你的timing， higher 你的rating will be，which will give you better 分數!
Let's aim為ALL PERFECT!

If you tap too early 或 too late，you will get
BAD 或 MISS rating，ca使用 你的HP至decrease!
Be careful！ 演唱會 will end if 你的HP reaches 0!

開始 combo透過achieving consecutive PERFECT 或 GREAT ratings!
higher 你的combo count， more 你的分數 will increase!
Let's aim為全接！！
Double note icons should be tapped at same time!

For hold icons，press與hold until second icon appears at end的line的light.
Be careful not至release 你的fingers midway，as this will result於MISS!

Getting GOOD on star icon will reduce 你的HP!
Additionally，if 你獲得 BAD 或 MISS rating
你的HP will decrease more than usual，so be careful!
For swing icons，slide 你的finger across來自first至last的icons!

Each club 成員 has her own skill，which activates if certain conditions are met!
These skills have various effects，such as 恢復 你的HP
或 increasing 你的分數 after certain number的combos!

Choose 你的best girl與participate於best girl 排行榜!
In best girl 排行榜，players與same best girl
compete與one another based on their event points!

曜 can earn 獎勵s，including 稱號為你的best girl,
透過 winning 頂端 spot於best girl 排行榜!

Each 歌曲與club 成員 has smile，pure，或 cool attribute!
To aim為high 分數，try building team與成員 that match attribute的歌曲!

曜 will get 分數 bonus each time you tap 節奏圖示 on club 成員 whose group matches 歌曲 you're playing!
曜 will also get 分數 bonus為成員 who match attribute的歌曲!

When club 成員 is 選擇ed as center，her center skill will be activated!
These skills affect all 成員 who meet 指定 conditions!
Let's build team that maximizes effect的center skill!

If you're having trouble building team，try 使用 "推薦" feature!
選擇 你的preferences such as attributes與skills，與 system will 自動 build team為you!

曜 can customize 演唱會 settings於options menu,
such as speed的節奏圖示!
Try adjusting settings至optimize 你的gaming experience!

Multiplying 你的LP cost directly increases 數量的獎勵s you obtain!
Try increasing cost 當 you have lots的LP!
more LP you consume， more 機率s you will also have至obtain 隨機 獎勵s!

Once you have cleared 歌曲，你可以skip it at 難度 等級 you've cleared!
跳過ping requires 跳過 票券與LP,
與 你可以obtain 獎勵s just as於普通 play!

Each 歌曲與club 成員 has smile，pure，或 cool attribute!

曜 will get 分數 bonus each time you tap 節奏圖示 on club 成員 whose group matches 歌曲 you're playing!
曜 will also get 分數 bonus為成員 who match attribute的歌曲!

club 成員 選擇ed as center will activate her center skill!
These skills affect all 成員 who meet 指定 conditions!
Let's build team that maximizes effectiveness的each center skill!

If you're having trouble building team，try 使用 "推薦" feature!
選擇 你的preferences such as attributes與skills，與 system will 自動 build team為you!

When you clear 演唱會，你可以earn 道具至power up 你的成員!
Participating於演唱會 will also increase 你的bond與club 成員於你的team!

曜 can 等級 up 你的成員於練習s透過使用
練習 Notebooks 獲得來自演唱會與每日 招募!
Attempt more difficult 演唱會與你的等級ed-up club 成員!

Let's attempt difficult 演唱會與aim為high 分數s
與 你的等級ed-up club 成員!

曜 can deepen 你的bond與club 成員
與 unlock new chats透過participating於演唱會!

曜 can obtain various 道具於道具 招募1次 per day，such as 練習 Notebooks與技能筆記!
Don't forget至claim 你的道具!

曜 can obtain 獎勵s 當 you clear 演唱會!
Additionally，你的bond與club 成員於你的team will increase!
As 你的bond increases，you may 獲得 chat messages來自你的成員!

When 你的bond與club 成員 increases，you may 獲得 chat messages!
曜 can increase 你的bond 透過完成 演唱會 together!
Your bond與成員 選擇ed as center will increase most!

When 你的bond與multiple club 成員 increases，you may 獲得 group chat messages!
Deepen 你的bond與lots的成員至have fun chatting與them!
And who knows？On special occasions，something wonderful may happen...

曜 can recruit new club 成員與愛心寶石 或 招募券!
Each 招募 has different 內容，so make sure至check 招募 details!
Some 招募 are only available為期間限定，so be sure至keep 你的eyes peeled!

曜 can obtain various 道具於道具 招募1次 per day，such as 練習 Notebooks與技能筆記!
Don't forget至claim 你的道具!
Newly joined club 成員 will have "NEW" label!

higher 稀有度的duplicate club 成員， more 螢光棒 you will obtain!

曜 will earn 招募 points each time you perform 招募!
招募 points can be exchanged為道具與club 成員於交換 商店!
Note that 當 你的招募 points expire，they will be 轉換 into 技能筆記 (M)!

so choose guest 成員 that，為 example，matches 歌曲 attribute 或 fits 你的team!

Learn how至play SIF2 透過完成 bingo goals!
